meta.changelog: v1.8: H-1 audit fix — adaptive polling (2-min trigger, high-vol positions every cycle, normal positions every ~16 min). Volatility classification: ATR%, VIX regime, leveraged ETFs, tier proximity, emergency price moves. v1.7: C-5 audit fix — atomic stop replacement via PATCH /v2/orders + overlap-safe fallback + circuit breaker (2-strike pause). Eliminates 500ms+ unprotected window. v1.5: Tier 2 scale-out — sell remaining 50% at entry+2.5×ATR for full automated exit. v1.4: Tier 1 scale-out 50%. v1.3: CCL edge case. v1.2: Auto-place. v1.1: Fill detect. v1.0: Tiers.
